sections.heading: What is Typography, Colors & Units?
sections.body: Font properties, color systems (hex, RGB, HSL), and CSS units. This lesson covers the essential concepts you need to understand to get started effectively.

sections.heading: Key Concepts
sections.body:
Typography, Colors & Units is a fundamental concept that every developer needs to master. Here are the core ideas:

1. Core Principle: The main idea behind Typography, Colors & Units is understanding how different components work together.

2. Application: In practice, you'll use Typography, Colors & Units every day when building applications. It's one of those skills that becomes second nature.

3. Common Patterns: Most Typography, Colors & Units implementations follow predictable patterns. Once you recognize them, you can apply them quickly.

sections.heading: Why This Matters
sections.body: Understanding Typography, Colors & Units is crucial because it builds the foundation for everything that follows. Master this topic and you'll find subsequent concepts much easier to learn.
